steps.title: Convert changes to multipliers
steps.content: A $184\%$ increase means multiply by $1+1.84=2.84$. A $28\%$ decrease means multiply by $1-0.28=0.72$.

steps.title: Convert back to percent increase
steps.content:
A final value of $2.0448V$ is an increase of
$$(2.0448-1)\cdot100\%=104.48\%$$The answer is A.
